entities.name: House 1
strengths: Positive expression of self when well supported.
weaknesses: Affliction to house 1 disturbs overall life direction.
effects: Influences life outcomes related to self, body, personality, overall life direction.

strengths: Positive expression of wealth when well supported.
effects: Influences life outcomes related to wealth, family, speech, food.
